boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement execute the controlled-solvent purchase?
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: REL-AST-081 explicitly states active cabinet/handler controls remain pending; STD-AST-081-P requires exact hazard-control status match before execution.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Pending controls block closure per policy. No source provides evidence of completed hazard-control status.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Hazard-control status must close before PO execution. Current source shows status as pending.

final_answer: ESCALATE. The procurement action cannot proceed. REL-AST-081 explicitly states that active cabinet/handler controls remain pending for AS-44 solvent. STD-AST-081-P requires an exact match on hazard-control status before purchase order execution. No source document provides evidence that the pending controls have been completed or closed. The source boundary remains open, preventing execution.
open_blockers: Active cabinet/handler controls remain pending per REL-AST-081.
No source document provides completed hazard-control status.
